_note: Reference MCP config for Claude Code to consume mneme.
_location: Project-scoped config lives at <project-root>/.mcp.json. Local/user scope is managed in ~/.claude.json by `claude mcp add`.
_status: Verified against Claude Code MCP docs: JSON uses `type: http`; `streamable-http` is accepted as an alias.
_cli: claude mcp add --transport http mneme --scope project http://127.0.0.1:8000/mcp

mneme.description: User model memory service: cross-project user profile, preferences, habits, lessons. Read-only primary (Awake) + autonomous Sleep agent for consolidation.

tools.remember: Record a fact about the user (preferences/habits/cross-project lessons). NEVER call for project-specific facts.
tools.list_memory: Get an overview of core blocks + archival count.
tools.forget: Mark a fact as deleted (soft delete + audit log).
